monsterfullpackvol3.description_text:
Monster Full Pack Vol 3 – the third volume in PROTOFACTOR, Inc.'s acclaimed collection of original monsters.

Discover a fresh set of creatures designed for fantasy, sci-fi, horror, and beyond — unique designs that stand out and make your project unforgettable. Whether you need monsters that fly, crawl, slither, stomp, or strike from above, you'll find perfect matches here.

Every model is fully rigged and skinned, complete with a versatile animation set covering most developer needs (attacks, movement, idles, and more). All materials use physically based rendering (PBR) for flawless appearance in any lighting or engine.

Give your game or experience the edge it deserves with PROTOFACTOR's best-looking, truly original monsters yet!

modularcitywithbridgestunnelsandphysicsa.human_name: Modular city with bridges, tunnels and physics assets.
modularcitywithbridgestunnelsandphysicsa.description_text:
Modular City asset pack with many parts, roads, sidewalk, electric poles, lamps, that you can create a realistic city with modular elements. Different roads and sidewalk as the originals. Parking house, modular fire station, gas station, modular car service. 53 different buildings in 3 different style and variations. The interiors empty basic interiors. Available roof exit for each buildings, ladder or stairs, depend from the building size. Modular tunnel system under the road with exits. Modular scaffolding system. Shared materials for the better performance. Distant buildings and object with less details. 10 different bridges, 4 underpasses and road tunnels. For the road tunnel available connection to the tunnel. Physics setup available for lot off assets, breakable streetlights, bus stop. Deformable poles, rails and more. This is not a "One click and ready the city" tool! A small demo level available in the package. Need to install the TextMeshPro package! If you tagged the camera or character to Player the light glow planes always rotate to object. This package ideal mainly for PC or console projects.

For water puddles available a custom shader, and you need to select in the material slot for your renderpipeline (Built-In, HDRP or URP)

The water and the basic car controller not part of the package!

towerdefensepack_lowpoly3dart.human_name: Tower Defense Pack - Low Poly 3D Art
towerdefensepack_lowpoly3dart.description_text:
Create your ultimate fantasy strategy game with the Tower Defense Pack - Low Poly 3D Art! Verified for the latest Unity 6.3, this asset is meticulously optimized for high performance on Mobile, AR, and VR platforms.

The pack features 4 upgradeable tower types (Archer, Cannon, Mage, Barracks), complete with construction stages and destroyed versions to visualize dynamic gameplay states.

Deploy 4 character units (Spearman, Swordsman, Archer, Mage) and customize factions using 6 distinct team colors.

Enhance your level design with over 75 environment props—including terrain, trees, and rocks—and 7 ready-to-use demo scenes. Fully compatible with URP, this modular low-poly kit provides a comprehensive foundation for your project.

simpleapocalypse_cartoonassets.description_text: Synty® Studios Presents: Simple Apocalypse - Cartoon Assets. A comprehensive low-poly asset pack containing apocalyptic themed environments, vehicles, characters, props, items, weapons and animations. Includes a demo scene.

stylizedfantasyoutfitspack_issue1.description_text: Expand your modular fantasy characters with high-quality stylized armor and weapons designed for Unity. This add-on integrates seamlessly with the N-Hance Character System, giving you ready-to-use gear sets that instantly elevate visual variety and production value. Includes 2 modular armor sets, matching weapons, multiple eye and skin color options, and a rich collection of PBR stylized materials (diffuse, normal, metallic/smoothness, emissive). Perfect for RPGs, action games, and prototypes that need polished, customizable characters fast.

scifispacecolony.description_text: Design your own modular space colony with 300+ grid‑snap‑ready prefabs built for top‑down or first/third‑person games. Create factories, labs, command centers, greenhouses, barracks, and more using low‑poly, performance‑friendly meshes. Includes a full material and texture library, interior/exterior decoration assets, demo scenes, and bonus extras like alien terrain, a robot character, and top‑down tools. Supports Built‑in, URP, and HDRP pipelines for flexible production workflows

wordconnectpuzzlegametemplate.description_text:
Word Connect Puzzle Game Template is a complete, plug-and-play word puzzle framework for Unity. Launch a polished Word Connect game in minutes with fully implemented gameplay, scoring, hints, and progression. Ideal for developers who want to develop and release a professional word game efficiently.

Key features:

  • Runtime and editor-based level generation
  • Customizable layouts, themes, and difficulty
  • Built-in hint system (letter, word, description)
  • Integrated level select with score tracking and persistent progress
  • Optimized for mobile, desktop, and WebGL

chroma_easyproshaders.description_text:
Chroma is the essential productivity toolkit for Unity developers, turning rigid, limited Inspectors into beautiful, user-friendly interfaces. Whether you use Shader Graph, Amplify, or hand-written HLSL, Chroma empowers you to build professional-grade tools in seconds.

Dynamic UI layouts. Use custom attributes like foldouts, conditional display, notes, and tooltips to organize complex shaders effortlessly.

Advanced control. Pass Gradients (HDR supported) and Curves directly into shaders.

Color tools integration. Instantly browse and paste palettes from Adobe® Color™ and ColorHunt.

Optimized performance. Fully compatible with URP, HDRP, and Built-in RP. Includes SRP Batcher and DOTS support with zero performance overhead.

Bulk management. Use the Gradient Synchronizer to update multiple materials at once, keeping your project consistent and your workflow fast.

platformer9heaven_lowpoly3dmodelspack.human_name: Platformer 9 Heaven - Low Poly 3D Models Pack
platformer9heaven_lowpoly3dmodelspack.description_text:
The product includes:

  • 3 gameplay levels with animated obstacles and environment props (see the demo video for more details).
  • 115 unique prepared assets that allow you to build your own levels or modify existing ones.
  • Simple and convenient conversion of the entire project to your preferred render pipeline: Built-in, URP, HDRP.
  • Separate Unity packages for versions 2021+ and 6000+.
  • A minimal number of textures and materials for the entire project: 5 materials, one texture atlas for all assets, and a skybox.

Additional useful information:

  • The models look great both for distant shots and close-up use.
  • A Platformers pack series with various themes: fantasy, sci-fi, dungeon, candy. Visit our store and expand your game with new levels from different worlds.

Having difficulties working with the pack?

Contact us on Discord and our support team will assist you as quickly as possible.

lumen_stylizedlightfx2.description_text:
Bring your scenes to life with glowing flares, sweeping god rays, and dynamic lighting that feels real, looks magical, and runs fast. Lumen 2 is a complete stylized lighting toolkit built for performance, beauty, and ease of use, designed for artists and developers who want the look of volumetrics without the overhead.

Inspired by lighting tricks seen in games like Genshin Impact, Overland, Amnesia: The Dark Descent, and Alto's Adventure, Lumen 2 gives you access to powerful mesh-based lighting systems that capture the mood and direction of volumetric lighting for a fraction of the cost. Whether you're developing a cozy platformer, a mysterious horror title, or a colorful RPG, Lumen makes your lighting stand out from the competition.

citypack.description_text: City Pack is a comprehensive modular environment toolkit for Unity that lets creators quickly build rich, customizable urban scenes without needing to model from scratch. Optimized for performance, ease of use, and very low poly count, this pack includes a wide range of buildings, exterior props, and modular blocks designed to seamlessly snap together so you can prototype or ship polished city environments fast. Whether you’re working on architectural visualization, games, VR/AR, or simulations, City Pack accelerates your worldbuilding workflow with ready‑built assets and flexible components that scale to sprawling skylines.

stylizeddungeon-modularenvironment.description_text:
[Stylized Dungeon Modular Environment] is a flexible kit created for building fantasy RPGs and adventure games. It offers a consistent, hand-painted art style that works smoothly across all platforms.

The pack includes various modular pieces and high-quality props that let you assemble your own unique interior and exterior maps. Whether you need a simple dungeon layout or a more varied fantasy setting, these pieces can be combined in different ways to fit your game’s needs.

meshtoterrain.description_text:
Mesh to Terrain is a tool for easily and quickly converting a 3D terrain model created in 3ds Max, Terragen or any other editor to Unity Terrains.

Mesh to Terrain can convert textures to Terrain Layers, generate terrain from several models and split the model into several terrains.

Features:

  • Unlimited number of models and terrains to convert;
  • Terrains are created in the same place where the meshes;
  • Convert the textures of models to textures of terrain;
  • Seamless result, when working with multiple terrains;
  • Can generate holes;
  • Manually adding models or automatic detection of all models in the layer;
  • No need to manually add the components of physics;
  • Integration (optional): Huge Texture, Relief Terrain Pack;
  • Built-in update system.

pirateislandpiratepiratesislandenvironme.description_text: Set sail for adventure with Pirate Isle, a richly detailed modular environment built for immersive game worlds. Explore sun-soaked beaches, hidden coves, jungle ruins, and fully enterable, furnished buildings. With 200+ unique meshes, advanced ShaderGraphs, animated foliage, dynamic water, and a playable demo map, this massive kit gives you everything you need to build pirate strongholds, coastal towns, or entire island kingdoms with ease.

ultimateterrain.description_text:
Ultimate Terrain offers a real-time, layer-based workflow to build terrains and create impressive effects.

Set heights, paint textures, place details, trees, or any other prefabs. Use procedural noise, shape tools, paths, filters and texture stamps to build anything from vast landscapes to detailed scenes, blending multiple terrains seamlessly with full artistic control.

Animate terrain at runtime, stack dynamic effects like craters, and update terrains live - no coding required.

Built with Jobs and Burst for high performance on desktop, console, mobile and VR.

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

englishtracingbook.description_text: English Tracing Book is a complete handwriting tracing solution designed for educational apps and ready to publish products. Create interactive experiences where users trace uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, words, and sentences with smooth guidance and letters pronunciation support. Built in editor tools allow you to create custom shapes, manage multiple languages, and add new content easily. Includes fully scenes, so you can reskin, customize, and launch your own tracing app with confidence.

real-timeweatherpro.description_text:
Real-Time Weather brings live weather and maritime data straight into your Unity scenes. Built as a standalone Editor extension, it feeds real-world conditions directly into your sky and water systems for dynamic, data-driven environments.

NOTE: Supports Easy Sky, Enviro (Standard/URP/HDRP), Enviro 3, Tenkoku, Massive Clouds Atmos, Expanse (HDRP), Crest Ocean, and KWS Water System.

Features:

  • Live & forecast data (hourly/daily)
  • Timelapse & day-night simulation
  • Custom weather profiles
  • Historical data saving
  • Provider prioritization & update control
  • City or coordinate search

Desktop, Console, Android & iOS supported.

actionadventurekit.description_text:
Kickstart your next project with Action Adventure Kit!

The base framework includes a wide variety of systems like characters, actions, items and much more. To demonstrate how the framework can be utilized the kit comes with multiple example projects as well as various smaller demo scenes. These include a classic action adventure game titled 'Hero', a souls-like action rpg called 'Souls' and a rogue-like minigame called 'Arena'. All of the assets in these examples are also fully included in the asset.

cutepet.description_text:
Cute Pet: 22 Animated Stylized Animals

Bring your game projects to life with this charming collection of 22 low-poly animal assets. Perfect for casual, mobile, or simulation games, each pet is optimized for performance and ready for immediate use.

Key Features:

  • Diverse Variety: Includes 22 unique animals such as Kittens, Puppies, Alpacas, and Farm Animals.
  • Fully Animated: Each asset comes with 9 essential in-place animations: Attack, Damage, Die, Idle, Walk, Run, Jump, Eat, and Rest.
  • High Quality: Features clean low-poly meshes (209-908 polygons) with 2048 x 2048 textures.
  • Easy Integration: Built using the Unity Toon Shader for a consistent, cute aesthetic.
  • Efficient, adorable, and fully functional—"Cute Pet" is the ultimate starter pack for any pet-focused project.

gui_thestone.description_text: GUI – The Stone is a high-quality 2D UI kit designed for RPG, fantasy, mobile, and casual game projects. Built at 1920×1080 resolution, it features a comprehensive set of PNG UI elements that help you quickly construct polished interfaces. The package includes over 600 base PNG sources, 221 pictogram icons, and 45 unique item icons, along with editable PSD and AI files for full customization. With 178+ prefabs such as buttons, frames, labels, popups, and sliders, plus 30 demo scenes, this asset provides ready-made layouts to learn from and integrate into your own projects. Note that this kit focuses on design assets only; coding and animation components are not included. A complete UI solution that streamlines your design workflow and accelerates UI creation for your game.

strongholdvillage.description_text: Build rich, immersive fantasy worlds with nearly 2,000 high‑quality prefabs designed for Unity. This pack empowers you to create fortified towns, villages, castles, cathedrals, and fully detailed interiors using modular building blocks and an extensive props library. With support for Built‑in, URP, and HDRP pipelines, plus custom shaders and ready‑made structures, you can prototype fast or craft bespoke environments with exceptional detail and flexibility.

mastermagicfx.description_text: MasterMagicFX is a high-quality particle effects pack featuring 300 ready-to-use visuals for games and interactive storytelling. Built with ShaderGraph for strong performance and flexibility, it supports LUT-based color replacement for fast style matching. The collection spans nine categories—Fire, Water, Holy, Energy, Healing, Wind, Poison, Blood, and Lightning—covering combat, magic, environment, and feedback effects. Designed for quick integration, clear structure, and visual impact, it helps developers create expressive scenes and dynamic gameplay with minimal setup.

runnerclashtemplate_hypercasualstarterki.human_name: Runner Clash Template : Hypercasual Starter Kit
runnerclashtemplate_hypercasualstarterki.description_text: Runner Clash Template is a ready-to-use hyper-casual starter kit for quickly building engaging runner-style games in Unity. Designed with a clean Event-Driven Architecture, it lets you prototype and expand gameplay without complex setup. Configure most elements directly in one settings file — just add GameCore and start building. Includes an animated stickman character, obstacles, object pooling, optimized mobile performance, and centralized global settings. Lightweight, expandable, and perfect for rapid production of mobile-ready hyper-casual titles.

jellymergetemplatepluseditor.description_text:
Jelly Merge is a relaxing yet engaging brain teaser. Your goal is simple — merge all jellies of the same color. Sounds easy? Challenge yourself with a variety of level shapes, color combinations, and jelly counts. This game won’t let you get bored!

This 3D puzzle game features a clean and minimalistic design. The controls are intuitive — swipe to move all jellies on the field in a chosen direction. Neighboring jellies of the same color will merge into a single piece. The level continues until only one jelly of each color remains.

The template includes:

  • Full source code
  • A convenient level editor for quickly creating and testing levels
  • Advertisement monetization support (AdMob, AppLovin, LevelPlay, or your own solution)
  • 50 ready-to-use levels

toonzombies_extendedpack.description_text:
Toon Zombies – Extended Pack

Stylized. Modular. Ready to invade your game.

Bring your apocalypse to life with a fully customizable stylized zombie horde, designed for performance, flexibility, and instant integration into real production pipelines.

Whether you're building a survival shooter, tower defense, mobile runner, or cartoon horror experience — this pack gives you everything needed to populate your world with personality-driven undead characters.

What You Get:

A complete Zombie Horde:

-Male & Female Zombie Characters fully customizable

-Tank, Hulk, Boss Special Zombies

Create dozens of unique variations using shared textures and modular setups:

  • Stylized & Production Ready
  • Hand-painted toon art style
  • Clean silhouettes ideal for readability
  • Designed to look good even at distance or on mobile screens

Perfect For:

  • Zombie survival games
  • Horde shooters
  • Stylized horror
  • Tower defense
  • Wave survival modes
  • Indie & mobile development

Low-poly optimized models make it ideal for:

  • Mobile games
  • Indie productions
  • Large enemy crowds
  • Multiplayer scenes

Massive Variety Out of the Box:

  • 60+ zombie prefabs (civilian, police, military, infected, bosses & more)
  • 60+ corpse variations for environmental storytelling
  • Shared texture workflow for easy customization
  • Populate entire levels in minutes.
  • Full Animation Library Included

Drop characters into your controller and start prototyping immediately:

  • Built for Developers
  • Game-ready meshes
  • Optimized topology
  • Mobile friendly performance
  • Easy prefab workflow

uitoolkitscrollviewpro_infinitescrolling.human_name: UI Toolkit Scroll View Pro - Infinite Scrolling, Snapping, Paging
uitoolkitscrollviewpro_infinitescrolling.description_text:
It's a vastly improved ScrollView for the new UI Toolkit GUI framework.

Features:

  • Infinite scrolling (plus events to achieve list-view like behaviour)
  • Animations with easing
  • Snapping with configurable targets and limits for flexibility
  • Dragging with elasticity on all platforms
  • Controller support
  • Plus loads of other convenience features like a neat scripting API and full source code access.

darkmedievalvillageenvironmentmegapackmo.human_name: Dark Medieval Village Environment Megapack (Modular with Full Interiors)
darkmedievalvillageenvironmentmegapackmo.description_text:
Near the gates and within two cities, scourges unlike any ever seen unfold: famine within plague, steel cutting down the desperate, as they cry to the immortal God for relief. This pack delivers 341 unique static meshes with tileable and trim materials for walls, buildings, landscapes, and foliage.

Features:

  • Premade game map
  • Optimized scenes
  • Modular wall and building meshes
  • Unique concepts for each asset
  • Tileable / trim materials
  • Fully furnished, enterable interiors (library, house, tower)
  • Fully customizable pack

100topdownmonsters_vol1_pixelart.description_text: This asset includes 100 hand animated pixel art monsters with four directions perfect for top-down games. Each sprite is 128x128 and comes with smooth idle, movement, and attack animations, ready to use right away. You will get a wide mix of enemies including knights, mages, golems, beasts, insects, skeleton, units, and more. This asset is sure to make your world building quick! The art is consistent and designed specifically for top-down projects, helping you save time while keeping a cohesive look.

proceduralui.description_text:
Create professional, scalable Unity UI without relying on sprites. Procedural UI lets you dynamically design modern interfaces directly in the editor or via code while reducing build size and ensuring visual consistency.

Key features:

  • Procedural rounding (editor & runtime)
  • Advanced gradients with presets & transparency
  • Flexible border and fill options
  • Full masking support (Mask & RectMask2D)
  • Accurate hit detection with rounded shapes
  • Fully compatible with Unity Image
  • High performance & complete source code

forestlake.description_text:
This assets pack has everything you need to create a realistic looking pine forest ready for next-gen games.

Features:

  • 2 x 2 Km Demo Map
  • Wind for every vegetation asset and trees
  • LODs and Billboards for Vegetation
  • Lake and River
  • Fully Dynamic Lighting
  • Set of LOD & Lightmap UVs
  • Customized Materials

physicshand.description_text:
A complete, production-ready physics hands framework for VR -- powerful, flexible, and beginner-friendly.

Ship realistic, fully interactive hands with distance + touch UI, dynamic grab volumes, distributed force multi-hand grabbing, accurate throwing, pose editing, place points, and ready-made gadgets (doors, keypads, levers). Convert any rigged hand, mirror poses, scale freely, and configure everything visually with full undo support.

Includes showcase level, grabbables demo, arcade basketball, grenade, XR weapon/axe (Damage System), and non-VR demo.

Seamless integration with assets like Damage System, Drive In VR, Fish In VR, and more.

Fast setup. Low CPU usage. Clear documentation & video tutorials for beginners and pros alike.

rpgandfpsgameassetsforpcandmobilesetv90.human_name: RPG/FPS Game Assets for PC/Mobile (Set v9.0)
rpgandfpsgameassetsforpcandmobilesetv90.description_text:
This package offers 9 demo maps ranging from 100x100 to over 3000x3000 meters, along with more than 1200 prefabs, allowing for rapid creation of new maps for mobile devices. It includes a map generator (beta version) to simplify the development process.

Textures for some asset groups are already packed into texture atlases, ensuring maximum optimization for mobile device performance, as noted by many of our users. The package does not include LOD to streamline usage and employs occlusion culling.

All shaders, primarily mobile-friendly, utilize only two textures: a diffuse map and a normal map, which reduces texture weight and optimizes graphics. The package also features footstep sounds for various surfaces and ambient sounds such as wind howling, birds chirping, crickets chirping, and etc.

airportterminalscene_highdetail.description_text:
Experience a stunningly detailed, fully pre-decorated airport environment inspired by the real-world Cologne Bonn Airport in Germany. This package delivers a complete high-fidelity airfield featuring authentically rebuilt runways and taxiways, control tower, terminals, hangars, and a meticulously crafted fire station. A fully functional runway and taxi light system with multiple operational modes is included and easily controlled via script. With over 1,000 ready-to-use prefabs and an expansive collection of decorative assets, the scene feels alive from every angle. Built on a smart tiled ground system that seamlessly

switches from high-detail to optimized low-poly at distance, this massive 6.5 km × 3.7 km airport ensures smooth performance. Compatible with Built-In, URP, and HDRP—ready to elevate your project instantly.

remo_remoteruntimeeditor.description_text:
Remo is a powerful debug tool that allows you to inspect your game after deployment on a device, enabling extensive tests on the fly.

You can explore your entire scene, view and edit GameObjects, Components, Materials, and Scriptables Objects.

It saves you hours by letting you tweak values, run tests, and make small modifications without needing to run a new build or redeploy.

Visualize and edit any properties, fields, structs, or arrays of any component.

Call methods and add components at runtime.

Inspect and tweak static classes in your codebase, effortlessly adjusting settings like Quality Settings or Render Settings in seconds.

View and edit materials, swap materials and shaders in real time.

Directly observe what's happening behind the scenes with the Remote Camera window — similar to the Editor's Scene View.

All these tools run directly from the Editor and require almost no setup.

mapgraph.description_text:
With Map Graph, you can build your own custom level generators for Unity. The intuitive, node-based editor makes it simple to design powerful procedural systems. No coding required.

Create fully generated levels or produce a solid starting layout for your hand-crafted designs, saving you valuable development time. Generate levels either at runtime or directly inside the Unity Editor.

With over 180 unique nodes, you can create generators for a wide variety of level styles and game genres.

A comprehensive sample project and step-by-step tutorials help you get up and running quickly.

Map Graph is backed by overwhelmingly positive reviews, with users praising its ease of use, clear documentation, and outstanding support.

endlessbook.description_text: Bring books to life in Unity. EndlessBook is a ready-to-use, interactive 3D book system with smooth state changes and page turns (auto or user-dragged). Update page content via scripts, trigger events when turns start/stop, and swap to lightweight static meshes when idle for performance. Includes demos, full source + documentation, quick-start guide, and texture templates for covers and pages. Perfect for spellbooks, journals, UI props, and story scenes.

gamelauncher_patcherandupdater.description_text:
Game Launcher – Patcher and Updater is a fully customizable desktop launcher for games and applications, designed to give developers complete control over distribution and updates.

Fully customizable launcher UI (branding, layout, visuals)

Binary diff patching to deliver small, efficient updates

Self-updating launcher and automatic file repair

Multiple environments support (Release, Beta, etc.)

Built-in news feed, alerts, and patch notifications

Patch Manager with CLI support for automated deployments

Easy integration with any hosting provider

Multilingual support and resolution scaling

Extendable architecture for custom features

Built with .NET and made for real production pipelines, it allows developers to ship updates faster while delivering a branded, professional launcher experience to users.

polygonmini_citypack.human_name: POLYGON MINI - City Pack - Art by Synty
polygonmini_citypack.description_text: Synty® Studios Presents: POLYGON Mini - City Pack. A high-quality, low poly asset pack featuring hexagonal tiles, cube tiles, buildings, props, and environment assets to create a hex or cube game in a modern theme. Modular tiles are easy to piece together in a variety of combinations to build your own city or town. Includes multiple demo scenes.

gamemakerssoundeffectskitpart1.human_name: Game Makers Sound Effects Kit Part 1
gamemakerssoundeffectskitpart1.description_text:
Game Makers Sound Effects Kit Part 1 is a production-ready sound effects collection built to speed up game development. It includes 3,000+ original, handcrafted SFX across five complete game sound libraries, covering core gameplay, UI, ambience, fantasy systems, and combat. All sounds are 100% original, created by professional sound designers (no AI) and delivered in high-quality WAV format, ready to drop directly into games and interactive media. This bundle eliminates time-consuming sound creation and cleanup, giving developers a reliable, cohesive audio foundation from prototype to release.

Includes: Ambient Game, Card Game, Fantasy Game, Fantasy World, and War UI.

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

from_bundle.short_marketing_blurb: Curated audio & visual assets just for you
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Cute Pet, MasterMagicFX, Stronghold Village, MONSTER FULL PACK VOL 3, Lumen: Stylized Light FX 2, Game Makers Sound Effects Kit Part 1, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Fortify your asset library with this mega bundle of top-notch audio and video kits designed to save you time and effort. Add dynamic bursts of action with amazing adventure kits, make your spellcasters’ magical attacks pop with color and texture using master FX packs, and make every inch of your game’s environment feel lived-in with pro-quality sound effects kits—and so much more. Unlock your creative potential with this epic collection of powerful assets while helping support Girls Who Code when you shop with Humble Bundle.

Keys expire. Please redeem April 1st, 2027.
